about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Jerusalem Taxi - Over 15 years of transportation experience
about.text: Jerusalem Taxi is a leading transportation company based in Jerusalem, providing reliable and professional taxi services throughout Israel. With a fleet of modern vehicles and a team of multilingual professional drivers, we guarantee our clients a safe, comfortable, and punctual travel experience. Whether you need an airport transfer, an intercity trip, or a tourist tour, Jerusalem Taxi is your best choice.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Modern, clean, and comfortable vehicles for every need

standard.desc: Comfortable sedans for city rides and short trips

vip.title: VIP Luxury
vip.desc: Premium vehicles for business and special events
